title: Red & White Candy Stripe Sweet Shaped Christmas Bauble Hanging Decorations - Pack of 6
features: Festive Candy Stripe Baubles – Sweeten up your tree with these charming red & white candy stripe hanging decorations, designed in a playful sweet shape with a glossy festive finish. Perfect for adding a fun and cheerful touch to your Christmas décor.

Lightweight & Easy to Hang – Each ornament is made from plastic and thread, making them durable yet lightweight for effortless decorating. Ideal for Christmas trees, garlands, wreaths, table centrepieces and festive displays.

Perfect Pack for Decorating – Supplied in a pack of 6, each bauble measures 10 cm x 4 cm (3.9 in x 1.6 in) — the ideal size for spreading holiday sparkle throughout your home, office, shop or party space.
description: Sold: Pack of 6 Approx size: 10cm x 4cm / 3.9 in x 1.6 in Material: Plastic and Thread
